for the Field

Methodica's AgBot is a purpose-built autonomous ground vehicle engineered for precision agriculture — delivering intelligent spraying, mowing, fertilizing, and crop monitoring at scale.

Product Overview

The AgBot Autonomous
Ground Vehicle

The AgBot Autonomous Ground Vehicle combines advanced robotics, AI-driven perception, and precision agriculture systems to transform how farms operate — reducing labor costs, chemical waste, and environmental footprint.

  • 01
    Autonomous NavigationGPS/GNSS + LiDAR guided path planning with centimeter-level accuracy across complex terrain.
  • 02
    Multi-Task CapabilitySwitches between spraying, mowing, fertilizing, and scouting with modular attachments.
  • 03
    Zero-Emission PowertrainFully electric, 8+ hour runtime, reducing operating costs by up to 30%.
  • 04
    Real-Time AnalyticsOnboard AI processes sensor data to deliver actionable farm intelligence instantly.
AI-Enabled Precision Agriculture AgBot navigates row crops with <2 cm RTK GPS accuracy, optimizing inputs per plant.

Field Applications

Built for Every Task

From precision chemical application to autonomous crop monitoring, AgBot handles the full spectrum of agricultural operations across all major crop types and terrain.

Application 01

Precision Spraying

Variable-rate herbicide, pesticide, and fungicide application via AI-vision with boom coverage and individual nozzle shut-off to minimize chemical waste.

Application 02

Autonomous Mowing

Robotic grass and cover-crop management using GPS-guided row patterns, reducing manual labor and maintaining consistent cutting schedules.

Application 03

Fertilizer Application

Zone-based variable-rate fertilization driven by soil sensor data and satellite imagery, reducing over-application by up to 35%.

Application 04

Orchard Operations

Navigates narrow orchard rows for under-canopy spraying, mowing between tree rows, and fruit-load estimation using stereo vision.

Application 05

CEA Vertical Farm Operations

AgBot operates autonomously inside Controlled Environment Agriculture vertical farms — navigating tight rows, monitoring plant health, and handling precision tasks without human intervention.

Application 06

Field Data Collection

Systematic field scouting with multispectral imaging, soil sampling, and yield mapping — feeding continuous data into farm management platforms.

Platform Architecture

One Base Platform.
Multiple Applications.

AgBot is engineered as a single modular base platform that supports multiple sector applications. Choose the chassis and attach the right module — the autonomy stack remains identical across all configurations.

Agri-Sense Application

TITAN-TR

● Tracked Chassis

Mounts multispectral cameras, soil probes and AI-vision modules for per-plant diagnostics at scale.

4WD Platform

NOMAD-4W

● 4WD Wheeled

Compact 4WD with precision robotic arm for targeted spraying, sampling and light-duty field operations.

Base Platform
for different sector Applications

One universal chassis — swap the module, keep the autonomy stack.

Agri-Sprayer

Full-Scale Field Sprayer

● 4WD · Dual Boom Arms

Variable-rate nozzle control with dual spray booms. Covers open fields and row crops at up to 12 km/h.

Technical Specifications

Engineered for
Field Performance

Every AgBot specification is tuned for real agricultural environments — from dusty row crops to muddy orchards.

⚡

Power & Runtime

8+
Hours
48V
System

Lithium iron phosphate battery pack with fast-charge capability. Hot-swap battery modules available for continuous 24-hour operation.

🔍

Navigation & GPS

<2
cm RTK
360°
LiDAR

Dual-antenna RTK GPS with IMU fusion. Solid-state LiDAR provides 360° obstacle detection and real-time terrain mapping.

🚛

Mobility

12
km/h
45°
Slope

4WD or tracked chassis with active suspension handles slopes up to 45°, wet soil, and uneven terrain without crop damage.

4WDTrackedIP67
💧

Spray System

200
Litre
12m
Boom

Individual nozzle control with PWM modulation for variable-rate application. Integrated flow meters ensure zero-drift accuracy.

🧠

AI & Compute

40
TOPS
5G
Uplink

Edge AI module with 40 TOPS processing for real-time weed detection, plant health scoring, and autonomous task execution.

🌿

Crop Compatibility

12+
Crops
30cm
Min Row

Configurable row spacing from 30 cm to 180 cm. Supports wheat, corn, soy, cotton, vineyards, orchards, strawberries, and vegetables.

Sensor Suite

Perception Stack

Four sensor layers give AgBot a complete picture of its environment — from centimeter-level positioning to sub-leaf plant health analysis.

01

GNSS & RTK Positioning

Dual-frequency RTK GNSS delivers sub-2 cm positioning accuracy. Coupled with 9-axis IMU for robust heading estimation even under canopy.

GPS/GLONASSRTK <2cmIMU Fusion
02

Solid-State LiDAR

360° solid-state LiDAR provides real-time 3D point cloud mapping for obstacle detection, terrain profiling, and row-end detection at up to 100m range.

360° Coverage100m Range3D Mapping
03

Machine Vision & AI

Stereo RGB cameras with onboard AI detect weeds, pests, and disease at the individual plant level. Triggers real-time spray decisions with zero human input.

Weed DetectionStereo VisionEdge AI
04

Environmental Sensors

Multispectral camera captures NDVI, chlorophyll, and water stress indices per plant. Soil probes measure EC, moisture, and temperature in real time.

MultispectralNDVISoil EC

Safety & Compliance

Built Safe.
Certified Reliable.

Every AgBot deployment meets international agricultural robotics safety standards with multiple redundant protection layers.

🚨

Emergency Stop

Hardware E-stop accessible from all sides plus remote wireless kill switch with 500m range. Fails safe on signal loss.

📡

Obstacle Detection

360° LiDAR + ultrasonic ring provides 3-layer obstacle detection with automatic slow-down and stop zones.

🔒

Geofencing

Centimetre-accurate GPS geofencing prevents operation outside permitted boundaries. Alerts operator on boundary approach.

📋

Compliance

Designed to meet ISO 18497 agricultural machinery safety standards. Full audit log of all autonomous operations.

Deployment Journey

From Order to
Autonomous Operation

Methodica’s structured deployment program gets your AgBot operational in weeks, not months.

1

Consultation

Farm assessment, crop mapping, and application design with our agronomy team.

2

Configuration

AgBot configured for your specific crops, row spacing, and chemical protocols.

3

Deployment

On-site installation, field mapping, and supervised first autonomous runs.

4

Training

Full operator training covering mission planning, monitoring, and maintenance.

5

Support

24/7 remote monitoring, OTA updates, and dedicated technical support.
